name: Arjun Mehta
bio: Former AI platform lead at Five9 and Genesys. 15+ years building enterprise AI systems at scale. Led the architecture of Kore.AI's agentic platform from 0 to 500+ enterprise deployments.

name: Lena Al-Rashid
bio: Built AI infrastructure at IBM Watson and Uniphore. Deep expertise in Arabic NLP, voice AI, and multi-modal agent systems. Leads delivery across MENA markets.

name: David Chen
bio: Former product director at Rackspace Technology. Drove AI product strategy for Fortune 500 clients across healthcare, finance, and telecom. Designs the AINS delivery framework.
